[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010000 2
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00101110 4
4 11000101 4
5 11010001 4
6 01011101 5
7 11011110 6

67 76 01010000 2 match 0
70 07 00100000 1

13 31 01000101 3
24 42 11010000 3

71 17 11000000 2

61 16 01000000 1
72 27 11010000 3
